title: ferray-ufunc: all/any don't support axis= parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.all(arr, axis=0) and np.any(arr, axis=1) reduce along a specific axis. ferray-ufunc's all() and any() in logical.rs only support whole-array reduction (return a single bool). There's no axis-aware version that returns an array of bools. This is needed for conditional logic on sub-dimensions, e.g., 'which rows have all positive values'.
